name: Impressive Frontend Websites
description: Build, redesign, or polish rich frontend websites and apps through grounded direction, visual assets, real UI states, responsive implementation, screenshot QA, and refinement.
triggerPatterns: make the UI feel production quality

chain.step: Establish a compact brief from the user request and available context
Gather current visual or domain references when useful
Collect design system or domain-specific interface guidance
Create or source relevant bitmap visuals when assets are missing
Generate a sandbox-ready frontend suite for websites, dashboards, demos, or landing pages
Build or repair previewable project files when direct implementation is needed
Capture browser screenshots for desktop, mobile, and important opened UI states
Iterate CSS, layout, assets, copy, and states after first visual QA
Use git-backed remote implementation and deployment when the frontend must go live
Run k3s rollout or verification when cluster manifests are the deployment lane
